title: Lifecycle
text:
</details>

<details>
  <summary>February 2026</summary>

- `minimax-m2` changed from [MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.1](https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.1) to [MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5](https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5).
- `qwen3` changed from [Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Thinking-FP8](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Thinking-FP8) to [Qwen3.5-397B-A17B-FP8](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3.5-397B-A17B-FP8).

</details>

<details>
  <summary>January 2026</summary>

**Added/Changed**

- `glm-4.7` switched to the official [zai-org/GLM-4.7-FP8](https://huggingface.co/zai-org/GLM-4.7-FP8); more GPUs allocated due to its position in the catalog.
- `kimi` switched to the multimodal [moonshotai/Kimi-K2.5](https://huggingface.co/moonshotai/Kimi-K2.5).

**Removed**

- `olmo` ([allenai/OLMo-2-0325-32B-Instruct](https://allenai.org/blog/olmo2-32B)) and `gorilla` ([gorilla-llm/gorilla-openfunctions-v2](https://huggingface.co/gorilla-llm/gorilla-openfunctions-v2)) removed — both had been broken for months without anyone reporting.

</details>

<details>
  <summary>December 2025</summary>

- `glm-v` upgraded to [zai-org/GLM-4.6V-FP8](https://huggingface.co/zai-org/GLM-4.6V-FP8) — larger context size.
- `glm-4.6` renamed to `glm-4.7` and changed to the [QuantTrio/GLM-4.7-GPTQ-Int4-Int8Mix](https://huggingface.co/QuantTrio/GLM-4.7-GPTQ-Int4-Int8Mix) quant.
- `minimax-m2` changed from [MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2](https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2) to [MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.1](https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.1).

</details>

<details>
  <summary>November 2025</summary>

**Added/Changed**
